title: Connected Baseline Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Connected Baseline Field using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a quiet interactive background for a light Bento card: four editorial baseline markers are connected by fine charcoal lines, and selecting a marker highlights its connected segment with one sky-blue node. The composition sits on #F4F5F6 with a white inner field, #ECECEE border, 22px radius, soft shadow, #111111 labels, and #4A4A4F support text. Sky blue is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or turn the background into an inaccessible decoration.

Use a labelled group of four real buttons, each with a 44px target and aria-pressed state. Click, Enter, and Space choose the current baseline; announce its label via a polite live region. Keep the thin connection lines aria-hidden and provide the same meaning in nearby text. Hover may lift a marker 2px over 180ms and press may compress it 1px over 90ms. Move the selected sky-blue node using a stiffness 330/damping 27 spring and fade the connected caption over 180ms. Preserve a dark 3px focus ring, visible focus order, and AA contrast.

At 320px, keep marker labels readable and allow the field to reflow; at larger widths, retain the horizontal route without fixed positioning. Prefer transform and opacity. Avoid remote assets, timers, storage, random values, network requests, and dynamic code. Under prefers-reduced-motion, show the selected connection statically or with a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-baseline{position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;max-width:420px;border-top:1px solid #1113}.uiwiki-baseline button{min-height:64px;border:0;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-baseline button:before{content:'';display:block;width:16px;height:16px;margin:auto auto 8px;border-radius:50%;background:#d1d5db}.uiwiki-baseline button[aria-pressed="true"]:before{background:#38bdf8;transform:scale(1.3)}.uiwiki-baseline button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-baseline *{transition:none}}
